texto: My music, I feel, has always been experimental, but it had got to a point where I felt disconnected from it completely. I didn't want to be a Clark Kent/Superman: I couldn't really say, 'Well, B.o.B's the old me, and Bobby Ray's the new me.' I had to just make a point.
explicacao: Citação de B.o.B sobre temas ligados a saude mental. “My music, I feel, has always been experimental, but it had got to a point where I felt disconnect…” articula saude-mental, me, want em registro de saude mental, com relevância para contextos como want e new.

frase_original: My music, I feel, has always been experimental, but it had got to a point where I felt disconnected from it completely. I didn't want to be a Clark Kent/Superman: I couldn't really say, 'Well, B.o.B's the old me, and Bobby Ray's the new me.' I had to just make a point.
